title: UI Configuration & Reporting Interfaces regression
description: UI Configuration & Reporting Interfaces regression. Teams confused about reporting going forward. OSA/DSA compliance work (UK/AU) that Ben solved mid-2025 being reopened. No one driving the principles Ben established.

title: Reports Removed Without Notification (Constructed Redundancy Risk)
description: Reports Removed Without Notification (Constructed Redundancy Risk). All 14 direct reports reassigned to Marqia Williams without prior notification. No formal communication, no transition meeting. Follows textbook fingerad arbetsbrist pattern: remove reports, point to empty role, claim 'no work exists'. Marqia expected to absorb 20+ reports across timezones.

title: Promotion Cycle Failure — Zero CoCaM Promotions
description: Promotion Cycle Failure — Zero CoCaM Promotions. Zero promotions approved for CoCaM in this cycle. EMs attribute failure to reorg-driven leadership discontinuity. Demonstrates replacement model cannot deliver basic career development outcomes.

title: Staff Engineer / Leadership Capacity Crisis (Policy & Safety)
description: Staff Engineer / Leadership Capacity Crisis (Policy & Safety). Bianca operating as single point of failure. VLOP preparation flagged as HUGE risk. No backup, no support structure. Carrying: VLOP prep, new systems, reporting, transparency/governance, cross-mission alignment, onboarding, supporting unprepared Product. T&S bottleneck-shift quantified — direct evidence of redeployment opportunity.

title: Competing Perspectives Narrative (Content Platform Redeployment Block)
description: Competing Perspectives Narrative (Content Platform Redeployment Block). Marqia argued Ben in ANY role within Content Platform would 'absolutely cause confusion' due to 'competing perspectives'. Converts Ben's existence in the org into a problem regardless of role. Provides Babar with rationale to block IC paths. Counter-evidence: Ollie transitioned GPM to IC with zero confusion concerns. 12 Slack searches found ZERO negative feedback about Ben from Marqia.

title: Strategic Leadership Vacuum + Validated Direction
description: Strategic Leadership Vacuum + Validated Direction. Ben's CoCaM Operating Model being adopted at CP level while he is pushed out. AI content onboarding (from Ben's roadmap) showcased by Atelach as headline demo. Content type onboarding 4 weeks to 1 week. Meanwhile: 'Everything is in a limbo now. Everyone is stuck.' New strategic work frozen. Sharpest evidence of contradiction in separation rationale.

title: Adrian Departure Confirmation + Advocacy Expiry
description: Adrian Departure Confirmation + Advocacy Expiry. Adrian confirmed leaving Spotify (~June 2026). 'I won't be back and that's guaranteed.' All active redeployment levers depend on Adrian: Staff IC proposal, Sarah Hoyle/T&S introduction, shield with Atelach/Marqia. T&S path now DEFERRED — ALL near-term paths are Adrian-dependent. Single-track exposure to Adrian's tenure is total.

title: Johan's ADHD/Coaching Framing (PIP-Adjacent Language)
description: Johan's ADHD/Coaching Framing (PIP-Adjacent Language). Johan suggested Ben needs a 'coach and mentor' framed around ADHD. Third instance of connecting ADHD to separation/transition: (1) 'fatal flaw' post-disclosure, (2) 'subjective and potentially unresolvable' assessment, (3) coaching/mentor suggestion. Pattern of using protected characteristic for adverse decisions. Under Diskrimineringslagen, this constitutes discrimination. Not yet materialised in written offer — monitoring.

title: Redeployment Offer with Imposed Timeline (No Legal Basis)
description: Redeployment Offer with Imposed Timeline (No Legal Basis). Johan wants deadline on Staff IC offer. No arbetsbrist declared, no MBL consultation. Timeline is artificial pressure without legal consequence. Seventh HR update: Johan withdrawing separation agreement. Timeline pressure shifts to redeployment offer acceptance. Specific quotes: 'I would like just to set some kind of timeline to this now.'

title: Staff IC Scope Document Received: Not a Valid Offer Under LAS
description: Staff IC Scope Document Received: Not a Valid Offer Under LAS. Document is a scope/JD with no salary, equity treatment, contract terms, probation, reporting succession, or success criteria. Not a valid omplaceringserbjudande under LAS section 7 (must be 'clear and precise offer of work'). Deadline unenforceable. Johan verbally committed to sending full T&C with unchanged salary/equity — written confirmation still required.

title: Johan Pre-Sportlov Pressure (Artificial Urgency)
description: Johan Pre-Sportlov Pressure (Artificial Urgency). Johan messaged wanting to 'check in today' and 'make sure things are clear on next steps' before sportlov. Artificial time pressure to prevent Ben having breathing room during holiday week. Seventh HR update: further urgency language — 'we can't have this both end for too long anymore,' 'I'm being a bit pushy on this.' No legal basis for urgency.

title: Operating Model Attribution Paradox
description: Operating Model Attribution Paradox. Ben's CoCaM Operating Model adopted at Content Platform level while he is pushed out for 'not pushing in the right direction.' Razmig's RFC mirrors Ben's approach 'almost word for word.' Quantified impact: content onboarding 3-6x faster, code changes reduced 45-60%, teams involved halved, bet capacity doubled (2-3 to 6 bets). In formal proceedings, contradiction is impossible to reconcile with 'change' or 'different direction' narrative. Exhibit-grade evidenc

title: Zero Decision-Maker Engagement Pattern
description: Zero Decision-Maker Engagement Pattern. Four people who influenced push-out decision (Babar, Ida, Swaroop, Atelach) have ZERO documented Slack engagement with Ben during 60-day investigation. Meanwhile, every person with direct experience supports him (Lex, Bianca, Filipe, Ege, Sava, Marqia). Binary pattern: direct experience = support, no experience = driving push-out. Seventh HR update: Johan characterised union as 'making it harder' and offered Spotify's own lawyer as substitute.

title: Strategy-to-Documentation Collapse
description: Strategy-to-Documentation Collapse. Ben was sole producer of formal organisational artifacts — ADRs, Staff Engineer Business Need Proposals, 13 Engineering Principles, RFC Knowledge Management, domain-to-people mappings, delivery tracking frameworks. Without him, strategy exists in Slack and verbal agreements but not formal documentation. New leadership may have no visibility into depth of contributions. Legacy momentum carrying delivery but new strategic work frozen.

title: Immigration/Citizenship Vulnerability Disclosed to Counterparty
description: Immigration/Citizenship Vulnerability Disclosed to Counterparty. Ben disclosed to Johan that citizenship application is pending and employment at Spotify is anchor for remaining in Sweden. Counterparty knows Ben cannot easily leave Sweden. Creates asymmetric negotiation pressure. Further disclosure in 7th HR conversation: 'I am not from Sweden. This isn't where I'm from.' Cannot be undone — containment only.

title: Turn the Page Waiver Framing
description: Turn the Page Waiver Framing. Johan stated accepting IC role requires Ben to 'turn the page' and 'perform at your best.' Ben responded 'I agree' [EXACT QUOTE]. If cited out of context, frames IC acceptance as waiver of all pending concerns. Time-sensitive — must send written clarification before accepting formal redeployment offer. Spotify could characterise as settlement-by-conduct waiving claims without formal agreement.

title: Immigration/Foreign Status Disclosure Event
description: Immigration/Foreign Status Disclosure Event. Ben stated 'I am not from Sweden. This isn't where I'm from' in 7th HR conversation. Creates data point an attentive HRBP could use to infer immigration dependency on Spotify employment. Combined with Risk #15, Spotify now has two separate data points confirming immigration dependency.

title: T&S Reorg Timing Uncertainty
description: T&S Reorg Timing Uncertainty. Sarah Hoyle confirmed T&S not ready to operate as real R&D org. Reorg planned — timing unknown. Adrian suggests H2 2026. T&S was the only path surviving Adrian's departure. Deferral increases single-track exposure. Positive signal: Sarah expressed genuine interest, 'great team' with Lex framing.

title: Arbitrary Timeline Pressure (Manufactured Urgency)
description: Arbitrary Timeline Pressure (Manufactured Urgency). Johan manufacturing urgency with no legitimate deadline. Asymmetric urgency: HR takes 14-day response gaps while demanding Ben respond 'already next week.' No statutory basis for any timeline imposed.

title: Single-Role Pigeon-Holing (Artificial Scarcity)
description: Single-Role Pigeon-Holing (Artificial Scarcity). 3 SEM roles and a PPM role exist but only 1 IC role offered. Promotion cycle creating additional roles not surfaced by HR. HR conducted zero matching exercises. Binary accept/decline framing is pressure tactic.

title: Unionen Support Gap / Escalation Fork
description: Unionen Support Gap / Escalation Fork. Helena and local reps confirmed written off — provided clause feedback only, cannot help further without formal case. Internal chapter head supportive but limited. Two escalation paths emerging: (1) union ombudsman contact obtained, outreach planned w/c 2026-03-09; (2) central representation can be requested (email received). Meanwhile, independent review (independent review) is primary legal support — awaiting brief + details from Ben. Shield risk remains: if Johan discove

title: Australia Travel Gap
description: Australia Travel Gap. Ben travelling to Australia in ~3 weeks. Risk that Spotify uses absence to claim non-engagement, impose deadlines during absence, or take unilateral action while Ben is less responsive. Lawful termination from standing start takes 4-5 months minimum — no snap action possible.

title: Promotion Cycle Redeployment Blind Spot
description: Promotion Cycle Redeployment Blind Spot. Promotion cycle happening now — each Staff/SEM promotion business case is technically an opening that could be a redeployment opportunity under formal LAS. Not being surfaced by HR. Time-limited — promotion cycle window will close.

title: Informal Redeployment Without Redundancy Declaration
description: Informal Redeployment Without Redundancy Declaration. No formal redundancy (arbetsbrist) process started. No MBL consultation. No formal notification. The 'redeployment' offer may not be legally binding. However, HR may later argue they 'offered redeployment' to justify further action or demonstrate to the union they 'tried.'

title: Compensation Review Exclusion
description: Compensation Review Exclusion. Spotify's annual compensation review happening March 2026. High likelihood Ben excluded given limbo status (no manager, no team, separation process). Exclusion would: reduce real value of IC offer by locking in stale compensation, create baseline disadvantage for all future comp decisions, constitute differential treatment evidence.
